applications.jobDescription: Build next-generation cloud infrastructure and generative AI models using Node.js, Go and React.
applications.notes: Passed the initial technical phone screen! Virtual on-site scheduled for next week. Focus on system design and dynamic programming.

applications.jobDescription: Help scale our billing engine developer dashboards utilizing React, TypeScript, and high-performance server architecture.
applications.notes: Applied via referral from former coworker. Recruiter said they are reviewing resumes this batch.

applications.jobDescription: Lead the UI foundation team. Maximize render performance, design system guidelines, and media-streaming player UX.
applications.notes: Received written offer! Base salary is incredible, with great benefits. Need to decide of other processes finish.

applications.jobDescription: Design, develop and scale modern React products across Instagram Web portal and messaging dashboards.
applications.notes: Completed final loop, but received rejection letter on system design panel. Keep studying distributed services.

applications.jobDescription: Help developers deploy, scale, and master Next.js, Edge compute, and AI integrations globally.
applications.notes: First screen with director of advocate relations went amazingly well. Recording a short Loom video demo'ing an Express-Next proxy next.

resumes.parseText:
Alex Spencer
Full Stack Software Engineer

Experience:
- Software Engineer at RetailFlow (2024-Present): Lead UI rebuild in React 18, improving initial load time by 35%. Wrote backend APIs in Express and Node.
- Associate Dev at CoreTech Systems (2022-2024): Designed REST APIs in Django, built responsive web applications.

Skills: React, JavaScript, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, HTML, CSS, SQL, Git, Docker, Python.

Gowtham R.
 +91-6374133796 | gowthamdax@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub
DHAN Attendance App | DHAN Attendance and Leave Portal | Madurai, India
Professional Summary
Software Developer with 2 years of experience building production-grade mobile and backend systems using React
js,React Native, Node.js, and MySQL. Strong focus on system optimization and scalable architecture. Proven
impact in reducing operational cost, improving performance, and delivering large-scale field deployment systems.
Currently working at DHAN Foundation (ICT-INAYAM).
Work Experience
DHAN Foundation (ICT-INAYAM) Madurai, Tamil Nadu
Full Stack Developer (2 years) Jun 2024 – Present
Key Project: DHAN Attendance App (Google Play Store) and Dhan Attendance and Leave Portal
– Built a React Native attendance system deployed across 16+ states, improving field reporting reliability at scale.
– Replaced paid geolocation service (HereAPI) with Haversine Algorithm, achieving 100% cost reduction.
– Designed a GPS-based hierarchical leave approval workflow ensuring data integrity and verification accuracy.
– Implemented Docker-based deployments across LAN/WAN environments, improving deployment consistency.
– Built secure SSH-based multi-developer workflow and automated deployment scripts.
– Handled production debugging, REST API optimization, and scaling issues in live systems.
– Built DigitalOcean Spaces cloud pipeline processing 5,000 images/day ( 1.8M/year) with optimized upload +
caching.
Tech Stack: React Native, Node.js, MySQL, Docker, DigitalOcean Spaces, Nginx, SSH, Git
Education
B.E. Computer Science & Engineering 2020 – 2024
Sri Shakthi Institute of Engineering and Technology Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu
Technical Skills
Frontend / Mobile: React Native, React.js
Backend: Python,Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
Database: MySQL, MongoDB
Cloud / DevOps: Docker, DigitalOcean Spaces, Nginx, Git, SSH
Notable Project
DHAN Attendance App and Web Portal
Production mobile application used across 12+ Indian states. Handles GPS-based attendance and leave workflows
with location validation. Designed backend architecture, REST APIs, and data flow for scalable field operations.
Implemented location distance calculation using the Haversine algorithm to replace external geolocation-based
dependency, improving cost efficiency and system control. Implemented UUID-based device binding mechanism
during user registration to uniquely identify authorized devices, preventing multi-device misuse and ensuring secure
attendance marking tied to a single registered device per employee.
Additional Information
Languages: Tamil, English, Hindi
Interests: Scalable Systems, AI Agents, Cloud Architecture

suggestions: Include metrics and bullet points showcasing quantified commercial outcomes (e.g., 'saved 40h/mo by automating standard pipelines')
Expand on cloud technologies (like Amazon AWS, ECS, or GCP) if targeting principal SaaS companies
Add Redis or Memcached under databases segment since many modern backend jobs require caching know-how
Explain test coverage techniques (e.g. Jest, Cypress) to prove production-readiness
improvedBulletPoints: Led high-traffic retail checkout redesign using React and TypeScript, boosting client-side routing efficiency and directly increasing conversion by 4.2%
Co-developed microservices server architecture in Express/Node.js to handle 10k+ concurrent requests, decreasing DB lookups by caching key endpoints

suggestions: Use strong action verbs like 'Engineered', 'Optimized', or 'Orchestrated' rather than generic introductory claims.
Highlight business impact by specifying concrete metrics, conversion scales, or loading speeds.
Refine your skills segment into structured groups (Frontend, Backend, Infrastructure).
improvedBulletPoints:
BEFORE: Worked on our main retail project using React and improved performance.
AFTER: Spearheaded React 18 core migration, applying virtualization to feed items resulting in 35% shorter initial paint lag.

BEFORE: Built Node and express backend controllers with database tables.
AFTER: Architected low-latency Express API routers linked with Redis Cache caches, decreasing database lookups by 44% during high load spikes.

roadmapSteps.title: Generative AI Foundations & LLMs
roadmapSteps.description: Master the basics of tokenization, embeddings, and API calls. Learn how to construct clean system prompts, handle rate limits, and select models depending on speed/quality constraints.
resources: Google AI Studio - Gemini API Guide

roadmapSteps.title: Vector Databases & Semantic Search
roadmapSteps.description: Build semantic search triggers. Integrate Pinecone, Milvus or SQLite-VSS vectors database with your Node.js apps. Store Embeddings using standard models.
resources: LangChain TS: Introduction to Vector Stores

roadmapSteps.title: RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) Orchestration
roadmapSteps.description: Develop server APIs that ingest resume PDFs/docs, slice texts into chunks, append vector overlaps, and query Gemini API to build Q&A assistants.

roadmapSteps.title: Real-time AI Streams & WebSockets
roadmapSteps.description: Implement interactive streaming chat bubbles or bidirectional speech via Gemini Live API. Optimize client re-renders and use Server-Sent Events (SSE).
resources: WebSockets in Custom Node servers with Client AudioCtx
